commands.label: Setup Account
commands.description: Sets up an account to use with SuiteCloud CLI for Node.js. Requires browser-based login to NetSuite.

commands.label: Setup Account (CI)
commands.description: Sets up an account for automated environments such as CI. Does not require browser-based login.

commands.label: Manage Auth IDs
commands.description: Manages authentication IDs for all your projects. List, rename, or remove saved profiles.

commands.label: Create Project
commands.description: Creates a SuiteCloud project, either a SuiteApp or an Account Customization Project (ACP).

commands.label: Validate Project
commands.description: Validates your SuiteCloud project against your NetSuite account without deploying.

commands.label: Deploy Project
commands.description: Deploys the folder containing your project to your NetSuite account.

commands.label: Package Project
commands.description: Generates a ZIP file from your project, following the structure specified in deploy.xml.

commands.label: Add Dependencies
commands.description: Adds any missing dependencies to the manifest file.

commands.label: Create File
commands.description: Creates a SuiteScript file in the selected folder.

commands.label: Import Files
commands.description: Imports files from an account to your Account Customization Project.

commands.label: List Files
commands.description: Lists the files in your account's File Cabinet.

commands.label: Upload Files
commands.description: Uploads files from your project to your account.

commands.label: Import Objects
commands.description: Imports SDF custom objects from an account to your SuiteCloud project.

commands.label: List Objects
commands.description: Lists the SDF custom objects deployed in your account.

commands.label: Update Objects
commands.description: Overwrites the SDF custom objects in your project with the matching ones from your account.
